examples: She has mastery of several languages.
He doesn't have mastery of the basic rules of grammar.
Later, I developed a broader theory of what separates the two general classes of learners helpless versus mastery oriented.
At the heart of this model is a reimagined educational experience grounded in mastery-based, personalized learning.
For parents, stressing intrinsic goals, such as mastery, learning and doing one's best, can be tough.
